name: weavatrix
description: Local repository intelligence MCP: reusable code graph for fast application understanding, Health, dead code, clones, history, blast radius and architecture safeguards. Local-first.
long_description: Weavatrix builds dependency graphs of local repositories (tree-sitter WASM, no native toolchain) and serves 38 MCP tools, including proof-carrying verified_change, health/dependency audit, clone families, graph history/diff, exact endpoint tracing, architecture contracts and cross-repository API tracing. The default offline profile enables 34 local tools and no HTTP tools; pinned, osv, and hosted/full profiles tighten or explicitly expand that boundary. Hosted profiles add a separate local-only preview_sync approval step before any graph upload.

repo_root.title: Repository to analyze
repo_root.description: The initial local Git repository. The offline profile can switch only through an explicit local open_repo call; select pinned to make this boundary immutable.

capabilities.title: Security profile or capability groups
capabilities.description: Use one profile: offline (default, no HTTP), pinned (no HTTP, repo switching, or cross-repo graph access), osv (explicit advisory refresh), hosted/full (owner-authenticated sync and contract pull). Advanced: exact comma-separated graph,search,source,health,build,retarget,crossrepo,advisories,hosted. Legacy online remains an alias for advisories,hosted.

precision.title: TypeScript/JavaScript semantic precision
precision.description: Use lsp (default) for Weavatrix's bundled bounded language-server overlay, or off for parser-only graphs. This is applied before the first graph build.

sync_url.title: Optional graph sync endpoint
sync_url.description: Endpoint you configure and control. preview_sync validates it and constructs the exact payload locally without networking; sync_graph sends only with dry_run:false plus that exact short-lived confirmation token; pull_architecture_contract sends only the repository UUID.

sync_token.title: Optional graph sync token
sync_token.description: Bearer token sent only to the configured hosted endpoint by a confirmed sync_graph request or pull_architecture_contract.

allow_test_runs.title: Allow verified_change test execution
allow_test_runs.description: Set to 1 only when verified_change may execute explicitly requested test/check/verify package.json scripts. Default 0 keeps the workflow read-only.
